description_long: This is a rustic, freestanding wooden shelf unit with four open shelves and a flat top surface. The structure is constructed from rough, uneven wooden planks, giving it a handmade, reclaimed look. The sides and back are composed of vertically aligned boards, some of which are slightly warped or irregular, adding to its rugged aesthetic. The back features additional diagonal and horizontal support planks, reinforcing the frame and enhancing its visual character. The shelves are open and spacious, suitable for storing or displaying various items. The overall finish is matte and dark, with visible wood grain and texture throughout.
description: A rustic, freestanding wooden shelf unit with four open shelves and a matte, dark finish. The structure features rough, uneven planks and visible support beams for a rugged, handmade look.
description_view_0: Front view showing four open shelves and the flat top, with the interior of the shelving unit clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side or back view displaying three vertical planks and a diagonal support beam, with no shelves visible.
description_view_2: Another front view similar to view 0, showing the open shelves and flat top surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side or back view with three vertical planks and two diagonal support beams crossing each other.
